nasb.text: Its arrows are sharp and all its bows are bent; The hoofs of its horses seem like flint and its chariot wheels like a whirlwind.

esv.text: their arrows are sharp, all their bows bent, their horses’ hoofs seem like flint, and their wheels like the whirlwind.

cnv.text: 他們的箭銳利，所有的弓都上了弦； 他們的馬蹄看來像火石，車輛似旋風。

ccb.text: 他们的利箭上弦，引弓待发； 他们的马蹄坚如岩石， 车轮快如旋风。

csbs.text: 他们的箭矢锐利，弓已拉开； 他们的马蹄看起来像火石， 车轮如同旋风。
